allow: Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT verdictLabel, COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE errorMessage IS NULL GROUP BY verdictLabel;")

Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, verdictLabel, COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE errorMessage IS NULL AND verdictLabel IN \('STRONG_BUY','BUY'\) GROUP BY screenerIndex, verdictLabel;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, MAX\(screenerAt\), COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult GROUP BY screenerIndex;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column -header prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, companyName, screenerIndex as idx, sector, ROUND\(price,2\) as px, ROUND\(marginOfSafety,1\) as MoS, compositeScore as comp, qualityScore as Q, healthScore as H, ROUND\(pe,1\) as pe, ROUND\(pb,2\) as pb, date\(screenerAt/1000,'unixepoch'\) as screened FROM ScreenResult WHERE verdictLabel='STRONG_BUY' AND errorMessage IS NULL ORDER BY screenerIndex, marginOfSafety DESC;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT date\(screenerAt/1000,'unixepoch'\) as d, COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE verdictLabel='STRONG_BUY' GROUP BY d;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='SMALLMID';")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "DELETE FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='SMALLMID'; SELECT changes\(\);")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT verdictLabel, COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='CAC40' AND errorMessage IS NULL GROUP BY verdictLabel;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT date\(screenerAt/1000,'unixepoch'\), COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='CAC40' GROUP BY 1;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, companyName, verdictLabel, ROUND\(marginOfSafety,1\) as MoS, COALESCE\(verdictCaps,'—'\) as caps FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='CAC40' AND verdictLabel IN \('STRONG_BUY','BUY','WATCH'\) AND errorMessage IS NULL ORDER BY marginOfSafety DESC LIMIT 12;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, COUNT\(*\) as rows, date\(MAX\(screenerAt\)/1000,'unixepoch'\) as newest FROM ScreenResult GROUP BY screenerIndex;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, verdictLabel, verdictCaps FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='SP400' AND verdictCaps IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "DELETE FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex IN \('SP500','AIM'\); SELECT 'deleted ' || changes\(\) || ' stale rows';")
Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, COUNT\(*\) rows, date\(MAX\(screenerAt\)/1000,'unixepoch'\) newest FROM ScreenResult GROUP BY screenerIndex;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT 'snapshots preserved: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenSnapshot;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, COUNT\(*\) rows, SUM\(verdictLabel='STRONG_BUY'\) sb, SUM\(verdictLabel='BUY'\) buy, SUM\(verdictLabel='WATCH'\) watch, SUM\(errorMessage IS NOT NULL\) errs, date\(MAX\(screenerAt\)/1000,'unixepoch'\) newest FROM ScreenResult GROUP BY screenerIndex;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, screenerIndex idx, sector, ROUND\(marginOfSafety,1\) MoS, ROUND\(pe,1\) pe, ROUND\(pb,2\) pb, COALESCE\(verdictCaps,'—'\) caps, date\(screenerAt/1000,'unixepoch'\) d FROM ScreenResult WHERE verdictLabel='STRONG_BUY' AND errorMessage IS NULL ORDER BY screenerIndex, marginOfSafety DESC;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, companyName, screenerIndex FROM ScreenResult WHERE ticker LIKE '%.L' AND screenerIndex='EUSC' LIMIT 6;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT date\(screenerAt/1000,'unixepoch'\) d, COUNT\(*\) FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='RUSSELL2000' GROUP BY d;")
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "DELETE FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='RUSSELL2000' AND screenerAt < 1780000000000; SELECT 'purged '||changes\(\)||' stale rows';")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT screenerIndex, SUM\(verdictCaps IS NOT NULL\) capped, COUNT\(*\) total FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex IN \('TOPIXSMALL','EUSC','RUSSELLMID'\) GROUP BY 1;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, ROUND\(marginOfSafety,1\) MoS, ROUND\(qualityScore,0\) Q, ROUND\(healthScore,0\) H FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='TOPIXSMALL' AND verdictLabel='BUY' ORDER BY marginOfSafety DESC LIMIT 8;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT verdictCaps, COUNT\(*\) n FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex IN \('TOPIXSMALL','EUSC','RUSSELLMID'\) AND verdictCaps IS NOT NULL GROUP BY verdictCaps ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 -column prisma/dev.db "SELECT ticker, sector, ROUND\(marginOfSafety,1\) MoS, ROUND\(pe,1\) pe FROM ScreenResult WHERE screenerIndex='EUSC' AND verdictLabel IN \('STRONG_BUY','BUY'\) ORDER BY marginOfSafety DESC LIMIT 8;")
